title: Family Story Interview
description: A newsroom-playful interview where kids repeat spoken questions to a grown-up, listen to long-ago stories, and stamp what they learned.
learningGoals: Practice asking clear spoken questions and listening through an answer
Retell a memorable detail from a family story
Compare life in the past with life now
interactionModel: observe-journal speaks each interview question aloud; after asking a grown-up and listening, the child taps a large sticker that captures what stood out
feedbackModel: Every interpretation is accepted with newsroom-playful speech and pop, whoosh, and sparkle SFX; the recap replays the interview pages as a family news story.

modes.title: When You Were Five
modes.skill: ask, listen, and compare childhood stories

modes.title: Where You Lived
modes.skill: retell stories about past homes and journeys

credits: Kaigani; emoji placeholder art only (see ASSETS.md). Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
